r4subui 0.1.0

    • Dashboard Tour

Default R4SUB Dashboard Theme

Source: R/app_theme.R
r4sub_theme.Rd

Returns a bslib::bs_theme() for the R4SUB dashboard with a clean, professional look.

Usage

r4sub_theme(
  primary = "#2C3E50",
  success = "#27AE60",
  warning = "#F39C12",
  danger = "#E74C3C",
  font_scale = 1
)

Arguments

primary

Primary accent color. Default "#2C3E50".

success

Success/pass color. Default "#27AE60".

warning

Warning color. Default "#F39C12".

danger

Danger/fail color. Default "#E74C3C".

font_scale

Numeric font scale factor. Default 1.

Value

A bslib::bs_theme object.

Examples

theme <- r4sub_theme()
